methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc: Set the AuditLog app ID (called once after deploy).

methods.name: add_record
methods.desc: Approved fiduciaries (Labs, Doctors, etc.) map a CID to a patient.

methods.name: add_prescription
methods.desc: Add a prescription to the global queue and to the patient's record history.

methods.name: get_pending_prescriptions
methods.desc: Return all prescription queue items that have not been dispensed.

methods.name: mark_prescription_dispensed
methods.desc: Mark a prescription as dispensed and update the bill amount.

methods.name: get_patient_records
methods.desc: Return all records mapped to a patient's address.
